scene_title: Daniel e as quatro bestas no céu
narrative_beat: Wide of Daniel lying on stone bed, sky opening above revealing four giant silhouetted beasts emerging from ember clouds

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: a young prophet lying asleep on a cold stone bed, body partially covered by rough woolen blanket
subject.focal_point: above him, a torn open sky revealing four colossal beast silhouettes emerging from burning ember clouds
subject.secondary: The four beasts: a winged lion, a bear, a four-headed leopard, an iron-toothed monster with ten horns. All in golden and crimson silhouette.

environment.location: a prophet's stone chamber opening to visionary sky

composition.rule: rule of thirds with horizon at lower third
composition.foreground: prophet and beasts in rich crimson and gold silhouette
composition.background: desaturated black-and-white stone chamber and clouds

lighting.key_light: otherworldly vertical light from torn sky

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber highlights, anamorphic lens flares
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, dust particles, floating orange embers

symbolism.secondary: the fourth beast different from all others

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
